name: Silicom Ltd.
summary: Silicom Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, designs, manufactures, markets, and supports networking and data infrastructure solutions for a range of servers, server based systems, and communications devices in North America, Europe, and the Asia Pacific. The company offers server network interface cards; and smart Card products include smart server adapters, such as redirector and switching cards, encryption and data compression hardware acceleration cards, and field programmable gate array based packet processing cards. The company also offers virtualized and universal customer premise equipment edge networking devices for SD-WAN and NFV deployments; networking targeted appliances; and bypass switches and intelligent bypass switches. It serves original equipment manufacturing, cloud, telco, and service provider customers. The company was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Kfar Sava, Israel.
